meaning: adj.火成碎屑的n.火成碎屑物
examples: The holocrystalline porphyritic olivine basalts and pyroclastic rocks are the components of Pleistocene to recent volcanic activities.
Pyroclastic flows are some of the most fearsome hazards posed by erupting volcanoes.
Pyroclastic flow generation, ejection of incandescent material, and tephra fall affected the glacier.
It claims its massive investment in grassroots outreach will shield it against the expected pyroclastic flow of negative advertising.
